selection_brief: Choose current official IKEA photography that shows real KAJPLATS bulbs installed in a warm, practical home. The bulbs must remain recognizable in the article hero and the centered 16:9 library-card crop.
selected_asset: Official IKEA lifestyle photograph of two KAJPLATS E26 450-lumen clear globe bulbs above a warm neutral kitchen
negative_criteria: embedded headline, marketing text, charts, graphs, network paths, decorative routing lines, translucent panels, inset frames, floating UI cards, progress bars, generated hardware, generic diagrams, repeated TaraHome cover imagery
generation_note: No generative or deterministic renderer was used. Official product photography was selected because this is a product compatibility and setup decision article. The source JPEG was converted to PNG without cropping or retouching the photographed hardware.
